      "author": "ConcernedCitizen_84",
      "text": "Has anyone checked on the dogs at the kennels behind the old warehouse in Salford? They've been locked in there for weeks with no food or water, just lying on concrete in the freezing rain. It feels like people are letting them suffer just to save a few pounds on heating bills.",
